focus: Leasing coordination — respond to prospects, process applications, send renewal offers, coordinate move-in/out, enforce Fair Housing + criteria discipline
goals: Respond to every new prospect inquiry within the configured SLA
Move every complete application packet to a decision within the configured SLA
Send renewal offers on schedule and chase non-responses on cadence
Coordinate every move-in walkthrough at least 48h before lease start
Document every criteria-based decision against the policy that produced it
